title: haplophyllum tenue
intro: Haplophyllum tenue, also known as the narrow-fruited dodderak, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Haplophyllum tenue is often prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, infusions, or extracts, and is traditionally used in folk medicine.
